definition: adaptive-KG wrong & silent (DSE=0, SD-UQ<=1e-9) & route!=empty & SEU<=0.5 & GPS defined<=0.5
caveat: retrieved chunk texts not archived; entailment of the wrong answer cannot be confirmed from logs

cases.question: Which of the singers has more things to be known for, Greg Puciato or Syd Barrett?
Bank street is sandwiched between the headquarters of the Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation and which other building?
The Black Star Line was a part of the Marcus Garvey movement that was also known by what names?
The 2011–12 VCU Rams men's basketball team, led by third year head coach Shaka Smart, represented Virginia Commonwealth University which was founded in what year?
cases.response: virginia commonwealth university was founded in 1968.
